# Iron Tuna

> Iron Tuna is a free fantasy football draft assistant for all three major draft formats — auction, snake, and best ball. It builds rankings and values calibrated to your exact league settings and scoring, and runs a live AI "Value Coach" that tells you who to draft and how much to pay while you draft. Auction is its flagship (three personalized values per player plus a budget-aware lineup planner); it also has a dedicated snake-draft assistant and a best-ball draft tool.

## What it does
- Free custom rankings/values calibrated to your exact league size, roster, and full custom scoring, for auction, snake, and best ball.
- A live AI Value Coach that answers questions and gives team-specific advice in real time as the draft unfolds, so your values and rankings never go stale.
- Tiered cheat sheets you can reorder, plus unlimited mock drafts/auctions.

## Auction draft tool (flagship) — https://irontuna.com/auctiondraft
- Three numbers per player: Proj (likely auction price), Value (true VBD worth), and You (your personal max bid given roster, budget, and the live market).
- A budget-aware optimal-lineup planner that finds the strategy and dollar allocation producing your highest-scoring starting lineup.
- Live prices that adjust to the room, an always-on AI navigator that says who to bid on and how high, and proactive insight on emerging bidding trends.
- Supports salary-cap, Superflex, and 2-QB auction formats.

## Snake draft tool — https://irontuna.com/snakedraft
- Custom rankings for your exact scoring, with ADP, tier-cliff alerts, and survival odds (the chance each player lasts to your next pick).
- The AI Value Coach tells you who to draft on the clock based on your roster needs and what is likely to be gone by your next pick.

## Best ball draft tool — https://irontuna.com/bestball
- Ceiling-weighted values (best ball auto-starts your highest weekly scores, so upside beats floor).
- Live stack alerts that light up the moment you draft a QB or pass-catcher, surfacing his correlated teammates.
- Championship-week (Weeks 15-17) schedule edges, tuned to your exact roster. Built for Underdog-style best ball.

## Key facts
- Price: Free to start (custom values + default rankings). One optional paid upgrade ($9.99) unlocks custom league scoring, reordering your board, the live in-draft tools, and the Value Coach.
- No account or password sharing required; enter or paste your league settings. Purchasers can restore access on another device with a one-tap email magic link (no password).
- Runs entirely in the browser and keeps working on draft night even if Wi-Fi drops.
- Best for: fantasy football auction, snake, and best ball drafts (any league settings).

## FAQ
- Is it free? Yes — custom rankings and values are free, no signup. The $9.99 upgrade adds custom scoring, board reordering, the live draft tools, and the Value Coach.
- Which draft formats does it support? All three: auction, snake, and best ball. Each value and ranking recalibrates to your exact settings.
- Does it work for any league? Yes — including salary-cap, Superflex, and 2-QB formats, and any custom scoring.
- How is it different? Most tools give one generic ranking; Iron Tuna calibrates to your league and adds a real-time AI Value Coach that advises you pick by pick.

- Snake draft tool: https://irontuna.com/snakedraft
- Best ball draft tool: https://irontuna.com/bestball
